name: CyTOF Combined Surface & Intracellular Staining
nameCn: CyTOF 联合表面和胞内染色方案

usage.en: Combined surface and intracellular staining protocol for mass cytometry (CyTOF) with optional stimulation, methanol permeabilization, and Ir-intercalator DNA staining.
usage.zh: 质谱流式（CyTOF）联合表面和胞内染色方案，包含可选刺激、甲醇通透和 Ir-intercalator DNA 染色。

materials.name: Wash buffer: PBS + 0.5% BSA + 0.02% sodium azide

components.name: Step 1 (Optional stimulation): Stimulate/treat 1×10⁶ cells per sample. To stop signaling: add 16% PFA 1:10 (100 µL/tube), 10 min RT. Spin 600 g 6 min 4°C. Wash 3× with wash buffer.

note.en: PFA fixation before surface staining may affect some antibody epitopes.
note.zh: 表面染色前 PFA 固定可能影响部分抗体表位。

components.name: Step 2 (Surface staining): Resuspend ≤1.5M cells in 35-40 µL staining buffer. Add Ab mix (10-15 µL, total 50 µL). Incubate 30-60 min RT.
Step 3: Wash 2-3× with 1.5 mL wash buffer. Vortex to mix.
Step 4 (Optional viability): Stain with 1:500 Rh103 in PBS for 20 min, OR 25 µM cisplatin for 1 min.
Step 5 (Fixation): Add 300-500 µL 1.6% PFA in PBS. Incubate 10 min (or 1 h) RT. Spin, discard supernatant (no wash needed).
Step 6 (Permeabilization): Leave ~100 µL on pellet, break up by vortexing. Add cold 100% methanol (0.9 mL per 10⁶ cells, final 90%). Incubate 10 min 4°C (prefer -20°C for 20 min).

note.en: Can store at -20°C up to 24 h, or -80°C up to 1 month.
note.zh: 可 -20°C 保存 24 h，-80°C 保存 1 个月。

components.name: Step 7: Wash 2-4× with >1 mL wash buffer.

note.en: BSA precipitates in methanol — add >1 mL buffer to dissolve.
note.zh: BSA 在甲醇中沉淀——加 >1 mL 缓冲液溶解。

components.name: Step 8 (Intracellular staining): Resuspend in 35-40 µL buffer + Ab mix (10-15 µL), total exactly 50 µL. Incubate 30-60 min RT with gentle agitation.
Step 10 (Ir-intercalator): Add 0.5 mL of 1:1000 Ir-intercalator in PBS + 1.6% PFA. Incubate ≥30 min RT (preferred: overnight at 4°C).
Step 11: Wash 2× with wash buffer. Wash 1× with MilliQ water (use 0.1% BSA in MilliQ if cells stick to plastic). Filter through 35 µm cap. Add EQ beads for acquisition.

notes.en: Staining concentrations matter especially for phospho-proteins. Ab bank mixes are designed for 50 µL final volume. Some cells stick to plastic in MilliQ water wash — add 0.1% BSA. For autosampler: resuspend in 50 µL MilliQ, add 50 µL EQ beads, transfer to 96-deep-well plate. Ideal: 0.5M cells per injection of 400 µL.
notes.zh: 染色浓度对磷酸化蛋白尤其重要。抗体库配方按 50 µL 终体积设计。某些细胞在 MilliQ 水洗涤时粘壁——加 0.1% BSA。自动进样：50 µL MilliQ 重悬 + 50 µL EQ beads。最佳：0.5M 细胞/400 µL。

ref: Adapted from Fluidigm CyTOF protocol (AH Mar 2012, DM Mar 2015)

note.en: After fixation with 1.6% PFA, cells can be stored at 4°C for up to 24 h before permeabilization
note.zh: 1.6% PFA 固定后，细胞可 4°C 保存 24 h 再进行通透

note.en: Cells in 90% methanol can be stored at −20°C up to 24 h, or −80°C up to 1 month
note.zh: 90% 甲醇中的细胞可 −20°C 保存 24 h，或 −80°C 保存 1 个月

note.en: Cells in Ir-intercalator/PFA can be stored at 4°C for up to 1 week before acquisition
note.zh: Ir-intercalator/PFA 中的细胞可 4°C 保存 1 周后再上机

detailedSteps.en: Stimulate/treat 1×10⁶ cells per sample as needed. To stop signaling: add 16% PFA 1:10 (100 µL per tube) for 10 min at RT
detailedSteps.zh: 根据需要刺激/处理每管 1×10⁶ 细胞。终止信号：加 16% PFA 1:10（100 µL/管），RT 孵育 10 min

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge 600×g, 6 min, 4°C. Wash 3× with wash buffer (PBS + 0.5% BSA + 0.02% NaN₃)
detailedSteps.zh: 600×g 离心 6 min，4°C。用洗涤液（PBS + 0.5% BSA + 0.02% NaN₃）洗涤 3 次

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend ≤1.5×10⁶ cells in 35–40 µL staining buffer (0.5% BSA/PBS). Add metal-conjugated antibody mix (10–15 µL, total 50 µL). Incubate 30–60 min at RT
detailedSteps.zh: 将 ≤1.5×10⁶ 细胞重悬于 35–40 µL 染色缓冲液（0.5% BSA/PBS）。加金属标记抗体混合液（10–15 µL，总体积 50 µL）。RT 孵育 30–60 min

detailedSteps.en: Wash 2–3× with 1.5 mL wash buffer. Vortex briefly to resuspend
detailedSteps.zh: 用 1.5 mL 洗涤液洗涤 2–3 次。短暂涡旋重悬

detailedSteps.en: Stain with 1:500 Rh103 in PBS for 20 min on ice, OR 25 µM cisplatin for 1 min at RT
detailedSteps.zh: 用 1:500 Rh103/PBS 冰上染色 20 min，或 25 µM 顺铂 RT 染色 1 min

detailedSteps.en: Add 300–500 µL 1.6% PFA in PBS. Incubate 10 min at RT (or 1 h). Centrifuge and discard supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: 加 300–500 µL 1.6% PFA/PBS。RT 孵育 10 min（或 1 h）。离心弃上清

detailedSteps.en: Break up pellet by vortexing (~100 µL residual). Add cold 100% methanol (0.9 mL per 10⁶ cells, final ~90%). Incubate at 4°C for 10 min or −20°C for 20 min
detailedSteps.zh: 涡旋打散沉淀（保留 ~100 µL 残液）。加冷 100% 甲醇（0.9 mL/10⁶ 细胞，终浓度 ~90%）。4°C 10 min 或 −20°C 20 min

detailedSteps.en: Wash 2–4× with >1 mL wash buffer (to dissolve BSA precipitate from methanol)
detailedSteps.zh: 用 >1 mL 洗涤液洗涤 2–4 次（溶解甲醇中沉淀的 BSA）

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend in 35–40 µL buffer. Add intracellular Ab mix (10–15 µL, total 50 µL exactly). Incubate 30–60 min at RT with gentle agitation
detailedSteps.zh: 用 35–40 µL 缓冲液重悬。加胞内抗体混合液（10–15 µL，总体积恰好 50 µL）。RT 轻柔振荡孵育 30–60 min

detailedSteps.en: Add 0.5 mL of 1:1000 Ir-intercalator in PBS + 1.6% PFA. Incubate ≥30 min RT (preferred: overnight at 4°C)
detailedSteps.zh: 加 0.5 mL 1:1000 Ir-intercalator（PBS + 1.6% PFA）。RT 孵育 ≥30 min（推荐：4°C 过夜）

detailedSteps.en: Wash 2× with wash buffer. Wash 1× with MilliQ water (add 0.1% BSA if cells stick). Filter through 35 µm cap tube. Add EQ calibration beads. Acquire on CyTOF
detailedSteps.zh: 洗涤液洗 2 次。MilliQ 水洗 1 次（细胞粘壁可加 0.1% BSA）。过 35 µm 滤帽管。加 EQ 校准珠。上 CyTOF

briefSteps.en: Stimulate (opt.) → fix PFA → surface Ab 30–60 min RT → wash → viability dye (opt.) → fix 1.6% PFA → MeOH perm → wash → intracellular Ab 30–60 min → wash → Ir-intercalator O/N → wash → MilliQ → EQ beads → acquire
briefSteps.zh: 刺激（可选）→ PFA 固定 → 表面抗体 30–60 min RT → 洗 → 活力染色（可选）→ 1.6% PFA 固定 → 甲醇通透 → 洗 → 胞内抗体 30–60 min → 洗 → Ir-intercalator 过夜 → 洗 → MilliQ → EQ 珠 → 上机
